title: Tungsten Equipment
description: A late-game upgrade path that gives you more options then just plain ol netherite.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4320e02735a87eb6557a40bcea61f6937bd7bbe8.png) --- ## ⚠️ This mod is designed for Fabric but can run on NeoForge if you install [SINYTRA CONNECTOR](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) ⚠️ --- # Check Gallery Images --- # Mod Features ### Items & Blocks Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots, Horse armor, Sword, Axe, Pickaxe, Shovel and Hoe Tungsten Upgrade Template, Tungsten Block, Tungsten Ore ### Tungsten Food Tungsten Slop Grants short duration effects: Regeneration, Resistance and Fire Resistance But Negative Hunger. Tungsten Jerky Grants short duration effects: Strength and Mining Fatigue. ### Heavy Enchantment Heavy is an enchantment compatible with armors, increasing an armors knockback resistance by 2.5% each level and also Applies an additional slowness penalty per level ### Advancements Adds **Tungsten Advancement Page**: Powder?, Yummy Slop, Metallic Munchies, Netherite’s Equal, Rich in Tungsten, Hidden Treasure, Forged in Tungsten, Cover Me in Tungsten, Tooled Up in Tungsten and Tungsten Steed --- # Progression & World Generation ### Progression Mine **Tungsten Ore** → Smelt **Tungsten Powder** → Craft **Tungsten Ingots** → Upgrade Diamond gear using **Tungsten Upgrade Templates** ### World Generation **Upgrade Templates** spawn in Strongholds, Ancient Cities, Desert Temples, Jungle Temples, and dungeons **Tungsten Scrap** has a small chance to spawn in Pillager Outposts, Buried Treasure Chests, Shipwreak Treasure Chests and Both Underwater Ruins **Tungsten Ore** spawns in the **deepslate layer**, in scattered veins. Generation style similar to Ancient Debris --- # Armor & Tool Stats
View Detailed Stats ### Armor | Stat | Diamond | Netherite | Tungsten | |------|---------|-----------|----------| | Toughness | 2 | 3 | 2 | | Knockback Resist (Full Set) | 0% | 40% | 60% | | Enchantability | 10 | 15 | 13 | | Durability Multiplier | 33 | 37 | 45 | | Movement Speed Penalty | 0% | 0% | -4% | ### Tools | Stat | Diamond | Netherite | Tungsten | |------|---------|-----------|----------| | Durability | 1561 | 2031 | 2500 | | Enchantability | 10 | 15 | 13 | ### Some Notes Lower **Toughness** than Netherite & Lower **Enchantability** than Netherite Higher **Knockback Resistance** than Netherite & Higher **Durability** than Netherite **Movement Speed Penalty** for each armor piece for balance and gimmick/fun
--- # Resource Packs Glowing Tungsten (Built in) - makes the tungsten ore texture glow **(recommended for shaders)** Legacy Tungsten (Built in) - reverts some textures to the originals **(wouldnt recommend)** Tungsten Textures ([seperate proj](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/weetbixs-tungsten-textures)) - swaps all netherite textures for my tungsten textures, use if you like the look but not the mod --- # 🔧 Compatibility
Known Compatibilities [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) (Crash fixed in 1.3.3) [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) (Adds Neoforge Compatibility)
Known Incompatibilities None currently known. If you discover a conflict, report it in the Discord.
--- # Community & Bugs/Suggestions Give suggestions, Report bugs, See upcoming changes & Chat with others using the mod. DMs are open if you prefer direct contact. **WeetBix Mods** → https://discord.gg/sKX224Xpva
